summary: Completed testing of Agent form modal fix and Communication System API endpoints. All features working correctly: Agent modal opens properly with visible header, form fields, and buttons. Communication system APIs (templates, analytics, pending reminders, soul questions, config status) all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Agent form modal fix verified - max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto applied to DialogContent
Modal header and footer are sticky (sticky top-0 and sticky bottom-0)
All form fields visible: Username, Password, Full Name, Email, Phone
Core Permissions section visible with 5 options
Pillar Assignments section visible with 15 pillar options
Cancel and Create Agent buttons visible at bottom
Communication system properly integrated into server.py (line 137 import, line 9090 setup)
WhatsApp uses provisional click-to-chat links (not full API integration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Communication system fully functional. Agent modal fix verified. All API endpoints working. Email via Resend is configured. WhatsApp is PROVISIONAL (uses click-to-chat links, not full Business API).
